# tinylog [![crates.io][badge-crates.io]](https://crates.io/crates/tinylog) [![docs.rs][badge-docs.rs]](https://docs.rs/tinylog) [![license][badge-license]](https://github.com/purpzie/tinylog/blob/main/LICENSE)

I wrote this for my own projects. It's published in case anyone else wants to use it (and for
my own convenience).

### Usage
```rust
#[macro_use]
extern crate log;

fn main() {
  tinylog::init();
  info!("beep boop");
}
```

### Configuration
Tinylog will use the `RUST_LOG` environment variable if set.
By default, this is `debug` for debug builds and `info` for release builds.

- `error`
- `warn`
- `info`
- `debug`
- `trace`
- `off`

The `NO_COLOR` and `FORCE_COLOR` environment variables are also respected. `FORCE_COLOR` takes precedence.

### Features
- Enable the `humantime` feature to add timestamps to logs.
- Enable the `parking_lot` feature to use its types instead of `std` types. This usually isn't needed unless your project already has `parking_lot` somewhere.
